domain_summary: AOF is a self-hosting AI Organization Operating System prototype. This repository evolves the runtime, artifact model, governance surfaces, and bootstrap flow used to operate AOF on itself and on managed projects.
repo_boundaries: docs/ contains the canonical product, release, and model definitions.
src/ contains the runtime, CLI, and verification commands.
schemas/ contains the canonical JSON schemas for AOF artifacts.
.aof/ contains the self-hosting operating memory for this repository.
protected_areas: Release tags and GitHub releases require explicit human approval.
Changes that alter the self-hosting artifact contract should be reviewed before claiming release readiness.
verification_entrypoints: Run npm test for runtime and schema behavior.
Run npm run smoke for end-to-end CLI verification.
Review .aof artifacts when changing self-hosting operating surfaces.
release_constraints: Self-hosting artifacts must stay internally consistent with schemas and runtime expectations.
v2.2 should stop at represent, validate, and inspect; adaptive runtime claims remain deferred to v3.x.
approval_boundary: Schema shape changes, release decisions, and tag creation require explicit human approval. Routine planning and artifact drafting may proceed autonomously.
